headline: Jim Cramer on The Campbell’s Company: “I’d Rather Have You Own McCormick’
summary: The Campbell’s Company (NASDAQ:CPB) is one of Jim Cramer’s stock calls as he discussed the impact of the Iran war on the markets. A caller asked whether it is a good time to take a position in the stock and whether the dividend is sustainable. In response, Cramer said: Alright, I never buy a stock […]
